title: Make Money Online for Beginners: A Step-by-Step Guide
description:
By the end of this course, you will be able to identify beginner-friendly ways to make money online, set realistic income goals, and confidently take your first steps toward building a sustainable online income stream. You’ll learn how to start small, choose the right platforms, and develop skills that grow with you, without needing prior experience or specialized training.

Your instructor, Tess Ogamba guides you through a practical, step-by-step approach to earning online. Drawing from her personal journey, Tess breaks down online work into simple, achievable actions that remove confusion and overwhelm. This course focuses on progress over perfection, helping you move from easy online jobs to higher-income opportunities and, eventually, a profitable online business.

This course is ideal for beginners, side-hustlers, students, stay-at-home parents, or anyone feeling stuck or unsure where to start with online income. To be successful, you’ll need basic computer or smartphone skills, internet access, and a willingness to take action.

By the end of this course, you will be able to:
* Identify legitimate online jobs and platforms
* Set achievable income goals
* Build a simple online presence
* Understand how to scale from small gigs to long-term income

No prior experience required—just curiosity and commitment.
